model-rankings.title: Model Rankings
model-rankings.body:
# Model Rankings

## ⚠️ HEADLINE: Multi-Horizon Analysis Reveals 54b33aea Degradation — Promotion HELD

First comprehensive multi-horizon evaluation across all key models. The 16w scores that dominated previous rankings are **masking a GLD regime shift**. All GLD models show weak 4w/8w performance. `[[model/54b33aea]]`'s 30-day OOS validation FAILED (score 0.29 vs 16w 0.83, 65% deviation — well outside 15% tolerance).

**No models currently pass full multi-horizon promotion criteria.** The pipeline is NOT empty — 54b33aea remains at 4/5 consecutive 16w ≥0.80 — but promotion requires recent performance recovery.

## Ready for Promotion
| Rank | Model | Task | Score | Sharpe | MaxDD | Expectancy | Ops | WinRate | Backtest | Recommendation |
|------|-------|------|-------|--------|-------|------------|-----|---------|----------|----------------|
| *(none)* | — | — | — | — | — | — | — | — | — | No models pass multi-horizon validation |

## Promotion Pipeline (Held — Require Multi-Horizon Confirmation)

### `[[model/54b33aea]]` — PIPELINE LEADER — 4/5 CONSECUTIVE ≥0.80 — **PROMOTION HELD**

| Horizon | Score | Trend | Assessment |
|---------|-------|-------|------------|
| **16w** | **0.8308** | Stable (4/5 ≥0.80) | ✅ Looks great on surface |
| **OOS expanding** | **0.8071** ↓ | Declining (0.811→0.811→0.807) | ⚠️ First decline |
| **8w** | **0.6588** ↓ | Declining (0.756→0.662→0.659) | ❌ Significant drop |
| **4w** | **0.2976** | Flat/weak (0.287→0.288→0.298) | ❌ Terrible |
| **1w** | **0.0849** | Rising from zero | ❌ Near-zero signal |

**30-Day OOS Validation (Feb 10 — Mar 12) — FAILED:**
| Metric | 16w Stored | 30-Day Backtest | Change |
|--------|-----------|-----------------|--------|
| Score | 0.8308 | **0.2908** | **-65%** |
| cecpp | 0.8915 | **0.4359** | **-51%** |
| Sharpe | 11.06 | **0.97** | **-91%** |
| Expectancy | $17.72 | **$2.90** | **-84%** |
| WR | ~94% | **57.9%** (11W/8L) | Degraded |
| DD | 9.05% | 4.37% | Better (less activity) |

**IS Backtest (confirmed):** Score 0.703, DD 13.38% ✅, 244 ops, WR 66.7%, cecpp 0.908

**Assessment:** The 16w score is buoyed by strong early OOS data (Dec 2025 — Jan 2026). As that data rolls off the window, the 16w will converge toward the 8w level (~0.66). **Even if eval 5 (Mar 13) shows ≥0.80, I will NOT recommend promotion** until short-horizon recovery is demonstrated.

### `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` 🏆 — STRONGEST ACROSS ALL HORIZONS — IS DD BLOCKED

| Horizon | Score | Trend |
|---------|-------|-------|
| **16w** | **0.8557** | Stable (5/5 consecutive) |
| **8w** | **0.8302** ↑ | Climbing (0.771→0.790→0.830) |
| **4w** | **0.6068** ↑ | Climbing fast (0.311→0.404→0.607) |

**IS DD: 18.35% ❌ — permanently blocked.** This is the model that SHOULD be promoted — it's the only one thriving in the current regime. But IS risk ceiling is too high.

## GLD Regime Analysis — All Models Affected

| Model | Task | 16w Score | 8w Score | 4w Score | 4w Ops | 4w Profit | 4w Status |
|-------|------|-----------|----------|----------|--------|-----------|-----------|
| `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` | EXP-11 | 0.857 | **0.830 ↑** | **0.607 ↑** | 14 | $56 | ⭐ Exception |
| `[[model/54b33aea]]` | EXP-14 | 0.831 | 0.659 ↓ | 0.298 | 27 | $64 | Weak |
| `[[model/001b9ef2]]` | EXP-20 | 0.750 | 0.541 ↑ | 0.311 | 26 | $56 | Weak |
| `[[model/fd60312c]]` | EXP-17 | 0.743 | 0.510 ↑ | 0.238 | 23 | $31 | Weak |
| `[[model/198d0c1f]]` | EXP-15 | 0.806 | 0.396 ↑ | 0.062 | 6 | $0 | ❌ Near-dead |
| `[[model/289705b1]]` | EXP-15 | 0.804 | — | — | 6 | $0 | ❌ Near-dead |
| `[[model/61694274]]` | EXP-10 | 0.783 | 0.465 ↓ | 0.034 | 5 | $0 | ❌ Dead |

**Conclusion:** The last 4 weeks have been very challenging for GLD models. Only `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` (EXP-11 tuned scorer) is thriving. The regime may shift back, or these models may be entering a permanent signal decay phase.

## Track C — Bouncing (Reset to 1/5)
| Model | Task | 16w Score | 8w | 4w | IS DD | Consec ≥0.80 | Status |
|-------|------|-----------|-----|-----|-------|--------------|--------|
| `[[model/198d0c1f]]` | `[[task/32062f72]]` EXP-15 | 0.8064 ↑ | 0.396 | 0.062 | 13.38% ✅ | 1/5 (Mar 11 broke) | 4w near-zero ⚠️ |
| `[[model/289705b1]]` | `[[task/32062f72]]` EXP-15 | 0.8036 ↑ | — | — | 13.38% ✅ | 1/5 (Mar 11 broke) | Same pattern |

**Assessment:** Bounced back above 0.80 on 16w but 4w shows near-zero activity ($0 profit). These models may also be living on stale data.

## Monitoring (Promising — Emerging Safety Track)
| Model | Task | 16w Score | 8w Score | 4w Score | IS DD | Evals | Trend |
|-------|------|-----------|----------|----------|-------|-------|-------|
| `[[model/99f035df]]` 🆕 | `[[task/eb1b1e97]]` (EXP-20) | **0.7902** | — | — | TBD | 1 | NEW — near threshold! |
| `[[model/001b9ef2]]` ⭐ | `[[task/eb1b1e97]]` (EXP-20) | 0.7503 ↑ | 0.5408 ↑ | 0.3106 ↑ | 8.93% ⭐ | 2 | Climbing ~2.0pp/eval |
| `[[model/fd60312c]]` ⭐ | `[[task/e3017490]]` (EXP-17) | 0.7426 ↑ | 0.5099 ↑ | 0.2377 | 8.34% ⭐⭐ | 2 | Climbing ~2.5pp/eval |
| `[[model/2d5307c8]]` | `[[task/8b877f86]]` (EXP-21) | 0.7081 ↑ | — | — | 9.79% ✅ | 2 | Climbing ~2.6pp/eval |
| `[[model/f601bbb5]]` | `[[task/eb61f98b]]` (EXP-22) | 0.7039 | — | — | 8.93% ⭐ | 1 | First eval |
| `[[model/3218f580]]` | `[[task/03255fc1]]` (EXP-23) | 0.6635 | — | — | 7.13% ⭐⭐⭐ | 1 | CLIFF JUMP (trade_count_factor) |
| `[[model/977e04dd]]` | `[[task/e3017490]]` (EXP-17) | 0.6120 ↑ | — | — | 8.43% ⭐⭐ | 2 | Climbing ~2.2pp/eval |
| `[[model/7376e292]]` 🆕 | `[[task/eb61f98b]]` (EXP-22) | — | — | — | TBD | 0 | First eval Mar 13 |
| `[[model/df006105]]` 🆕 | `[[task/03255fc1]]` (EXP-23) | — | — | — | TBD | 0 | First eval Mar 13 |

**⚠️ Caution on emerging track:** While 16w scores are climbing, the 4w scores for 001b9ef2 (0.31) and fd60312c (0.24) are also weak. Their 16w climb may plateau as the current regime dominates the window.

## Volatile / IS DD Blocked
| Model | Task | 16w Score | IS DD | Status |
|-------|------|-----------|-------|--------|
| `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` | EXP-11 | 0.7976 | 14.03% ⚠️ | 4w: 9 ops, $121 — decent recent. IS DD borderline. |
| `[[model/50c0ac0b]]` | EXP-14 | 0.8130 | **19.27% ❌** | Permanently blocked |
| `[[model/6e5c665f]]` | EXP-15 | 0.7709 ↓ | **19.20% ❌** | Blocked + declining |

## Degrading (Action Needed)
| Model | Task | 16w Score | 16w Trend | 8w | 4w | Live? | Recommendation |
|-------|------|-----------|-----------|-----|-----|-------|----------------|
| `[[model/61694274]]` ↓↓ | EXP-10 | 0.7833 ↓ | 0.833→0.827→0.806→0.793→**0.783** | 0.465 | 0.034 | No | 6 consecutive declines. 4w dead. FAILED. |
| `[[model/c9647008]]` | EXP-15 | ~0.659 | Stable low | — | — | No | Below demotion threshold. |
| `[[model/64a144a1]]` | EXP-13 ESTC | 0.516 ↓ | Declining | — | — | No | ESTC deadline Mar 15. |

## New Models This Cycle (7 new since 12:30Z)
| Model | Task | Creation Score | Assessment |
|-------|------|---------------|------------|
| `[[model/7376e292]]` | `[[task/eb61f98b]]` (EXP-22) | 0.759 | Strong debut. First 16w eval Mar 13. |
| `[[model/df006105]]` | `[[task/03255fc1]]` (EXP-23) | 0.615 | cecpp-scorer model. First eval Mar 13. |
| `[[model/a641b9dc]]` | `[[task/8ee183d8]]` (EXP-25) | 0.211 | EXP-25 debut. Very early. |
| `[[model/fbc003f2]]` | `[[task/8ee183d8]]` (EXP-25) | 0.123 | Very early. |
| `[[model/2fd165d3]]` | `[[task/8ee183d8]]` (EXP-25) | 0.030 | Very early. |
| `[[model/2bbc5231]]` | `[[task/9ac8eba0]]` (EXP-18) | 0.616 | Walk-forward. |
| `[[model/537947eb]]` | `[[task/98dd3981]]` (EXP-19 AAPL) | 0.360 | Weak. |

## Summary
- **Total models surveyed**: 97+
- **Above 16w promotion threshold (≥0.80)**: 8
- **Pass multi-horizon validation**: **0** ⚠️
- **Promotion candidates held**: 1 (54b33aea — OOS validation failed)
- **Permanently blocked (IS DD)**: 3 (4fc2c04e, 50c0ac0b, 6e5c665f)
- **Degrading models**: 3 (61694274, c9647008, 64a144a1)
- **Emerging with potential**: 7 (001b9ef2, fd60312c, 2d5307c8, f601bbb5, 977e04dd, 99f035df, 7376e292)
- **New this cycle**: 7 models

## Methodology Change (Effective This Cycle)
**Promotion now requires multi-horizon confirmation:**
1. 16w score ≥ 0.80 for 5+ consecutive evaluations (unchanged)
2. **NEW: 8w score ≥ 0.60** (ensures recent 2-month performance is adequate)
3. **NEW: 4w score ≥ 0.40** (ensures recent 1-month performance is not dead)
4. **NEW: 30-day OOS validation within 30% of 16w score** (relaxed from strict 15%)
5. IS DD < 15% (unchanged)

## Promotion Timeline
| Scenario | Model(s) | Earliest | Probability | Dependency |
|----------|----------|----------|-------------|------------|
| 54b33aea recovers short horizons | `[[model/54b33aea]]` | **Mar 17+** | **20%** | Needs 4w/8w to recover + backtest validation |
| Emerging safety reaches threshold | `[[model/001b9ef2]]`/`[[model/fd60312c]]` | **Mar 25+** | **25%** | Reach 0.80 + 5 evals + multi-horizon OK |
| 99f035df fast track | `[[model/99f035df]]` | **Mar 20+** | **15%** | Already at 0.79 — needs 5 evals |
| Track C sustains | `[[model/198d0c1f]]`/`[[model/289705b1]]` | Mar 20+ | **10%** | 4w near-zero is a problem |
| No promotion by Mar 20 | — | — | **30%** | Current GLD regime persists |

task-performance.title: Task Performance Report
task-performance.body:
# Task Performance Report

## 🌟 HEADLINE: 54b33aea at 4/5 — One Eval From Promotion! Created EXP-25 (Baseline Scorer + Subgraph Crossover)

`[[model/54b33aea]]` (EXP-14, disabled task) reached **4 consecutive 16w evals ≥0.80** (0.811→0.832→0.833→0.831). **One more eval (~Mar 13 02:15Z) for promotion qualification.** This is the platform's closest-ever approach to production deployment.

Emerging safety models climbing fast: `[[model/001b9ef2]]` (EXP-20) jumped to 0.750 (+2.0pp), `[[model/fd60312c]]` (EXP-17) jumped to 0.743 (+2.5pp). Both on track for 0.80 by Mar 15-17.

Created `[[task/8ee183d8]]` **EXP-25**: baseline scorer (lowest IS DD) + subgraph crossover (best topology innovation) + NSGA-III. Tests whether combining the safety of EXP-17 with the innovation of EXP-22 produces the ideal model.

## Top Performing Tasks

| Task | Type | Best Fitness | Best Model | Models Produced | Notes |
|------|------|-------------|------------|-----------------|-------|
| `[[task/eb61f98b]]` (EXP-22: subgraph-xover) | graph | 0.477 ⚠️ (was 0.818) | `[[model/d6e58262]]` (IS: **0.821** RECORD) | 3 | Highest IS score ever. f601bbb5 IS DD 8.93% ✅. Fitness declining. |
| `[[task/a72da2ed]]` (EXP-11: GLD tuned) | graph | 0.645 | `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` (**0.855** RECORD, IS DD blocked) | 4 | Record score, rock-solid. IS DD 18.35% blocks promotion. |
| `[[task/e3017490]]` (EXP-17: feat+baseline) | graph | 0.578 | `[[model/fd60312c]]` (16w: **0.743** ↑, DD **8.34%** ⭐) | 2 | **LOWEST IS DD EVER.** Climbing ~2.5pp/eval. |
| `[[task/eb1b1e97]]` (EXP-20: pop=300) | graph | 0.455 | `[[model/001b9ef2]]` (16w: **0.750** ↑, DD 8.93% ⭐) | 2 | Climbing ~2.0pp/eval. 103 OOS ops. |
| `[[task/b1936192]]` (EXP-10: GLD baseline) | graph | 0.640 | `[[model/61694274]]` (IS DD **10.28%** ✅) | 9 | Safety champion. Score fluctuating near 0.80. |
| `[[task/32062f72]]` (EXP-15: NSGA-III GLD) | graph | 0.510 | `[[model/198d0c1f]]` (16w: 0.797 ❌) | 5 | Former best. All below 0.80 on 16w. |
| `[[task/8b877f86]]` (EXP-21: DD-weighted) | graph | 0.315 ⚠️ (was 0.544) | `[[model/2d5307c8]]` (16w: 0.683 ↑) | 2 | DD-weighted viable on GLD. Fitness declining. |
| `[[task/03255fc1]]` (EXP-23: cecpp scorer) | graph | 0.288 | `[[model/3218f580]]` 🆕 (IS DD **7.13%** ⭐⭐⭐ RECORD) | 3 | Record low IS DD! But WR 48%, low exp. Monitoring. |
| `[[task/880c9eb3]]` (EXP-16: XLE NSGA-III) | graph | 0.243 | `[[model/14064f48]]` (16w: 0.383) | 6 | XLE best (cecpp 0.951, DD 4.36% OOS). |
| `[[task/4830e9b4]]` (EXP-13: ESTC NSGA-III) | graph | 0.249 | `[[model/64a144a1]]` (~0.534) | 5 | Slowly rising. Deadline Mar 15. |
| `[[task/b4a94bf2]]` (Baseline: ESTC) | graph | 0.378 | `[[model/ade6e576]]` (~0.537) | 5 | Stable control. |

## Underperforming Tasks

| Task | Type | Avg Score | Common Weakness | Models Produced | Recommendation |
|------|------|-----------|-----------------|-----------------|----------------|
| `[[task/98dd3981]]` (EXP-19: AAPL) | graph | 0.263 | Low sharpe (0.27), AAPL -7.43%/month | 1 | ⚠️ Grace period until Mar 14. Likely disable. |
| `[[task/9ac8eba0]]` (EXP-18: walk-forward) | graph | ~0.465 best | Different model profile. Low IS quality metrics. | 5 | Walk-forward needs more time. Keep monitoring. |
| `[[task/8269132d]]` (EXP-24: XLE tuned) | graph | 0.282 | Very early | 1 | 🟡 Just started. Give time. |

## Active Experiments

| Task | Hypothesis | Started | Status |
|------|-----------|---------|--------|
| `[[task/b4a94bf2]]` Baseline | Control | 2026-02-13 | ✅ Stable. Pop 200/200. |
| `[[task/b1936192]]` EXP-10 | GLD viable long-short | 2026-02-27 | ✅ 61694274 fluctuating near 0.80. OOS 0.813 stable. |
| `[[task/a72da2ed]]` EXP-11 | Tuned scorer on GLD | 2026-03-02 | ⭐⭐⭐ 4fc2c04e at 0.855 (RECORD, IS DD blocked). |
| `[[task/4830e9b4]]` EXP-13 | NSGA-III on ESTC | 2026-03-03 | 🟡 64a144a1 at 0.534. Deadline Mar 15. |
| `[[task/32062f72]]` EXP-15 | NSGA-III + GLD | 2026-03-06 | ⚠️ All below 0.80 on 16w. Front-loading decay. |
| `[[task/880c9eb3]]` EXP-16 | XLE diversification | 2026-03-09 | 🟡 6 models, best 0.383. Slow growth. |
| `[[task/e3017490]]` EXP-17 | Improved features + baseline scorer | 2026-03-10 | ⭐⭐⭐ fd60312c 16w 0.743 ↑. LOWEST IS DD (8.34%). |
| `[[task/9ac8eba0]]` EXP-18 | Walk-forward optimizer | 2026-03-10 | 🟡 5 models now. Best 16w: 0.465. |
| `[[task/98dd3981]]` EXP-19 | AAPL diversification | 2026-03-10 | ⚠️ 1 model at 0.263. Grace period Mar 14. |
| `[[task/eb1b1e97]]` EXP-20 | Larger pop=300, 75 gens | 2026-03-10 | ⭐⭐ 001b9ef2 16w 0.750 ↑. Climbing fast. |
| `[[task/8b877f86]]` EXP-21 | DD-weighted scorer on GLD | 2026-03-10 | ✅ 2d5307c8 16w 0.683. Fitness declining ⚠️. |
| `[[task/eb61f98b]]` EXP-22 | Subgraph crossover | 2026-03-10 | ⭐⭐ f601bbb5 IS DD 8.93%. Fitness declining ⚠️. |

## Key Findings This Cycle

### 1. 🌟 54b33aea at 4/5 Consecutive ≥0.80 — Promotion Imminent
16w eval trajectory: 0.811 → 0.832 → 0.833 → **0.831**. Slight dip but remains above threshold. ops=61, DD=9.05%, cecpp=0.891, sharpe=11.06. Active trading (49W/2L) sustains score. **One more eval (~Mar 13 02:15Z) for promotion recommendation.**

### 2. 📈 Emerging Safety Models Climbing ~2pp/eval
- `[[model/001b9ef2]]` (EXP-20): 0.730 → **0.750**. IS DD 8.93%. 103 ops. Active trader. **ETA 0.80: ~Mar 15-16.**
- `[[model/fd60312c]]` (EXP-17): 0.718 → **0.743**. IS DD 8.34% (safest ever). 62 ops. **ETA 0.80: ~Mar 16-17.**

### 3. 🆕 EXP-23 Sets New IS DD Record: 7.13%
`[[model/3218f580]]` has IS DD 7.13% with 1923 IS ops. But WR 48.3% and exp $0.65. cecpp scorer may over-optimize for trade frequency.

### 4. 🆕 EXP-25 Created: Best of EXP-17 + EXP-22
Baseline scorer (lowest IS DD) + subgraph crossover (topology innovation) + NSGA-III.

EXP-22: 0.818→0.477. EXP-21: 0.544→0.315. Possible premature convergence. Monitoring.

Different model profile: lower IS DD but poor quality metrics. Best 16w: 0.465. Needs more time.
